name: dxcare-web-slide
description: Claude Code plugin for building, versioning, and deploying HTML presentations. TDD discipline, 16 theme presets with a visual gallery + terminal picker, automated theme.css regeneration, data charts (Chart.js opt-in), AI-slop generation guards, references auto-extraction, dual PDF export (in-browser html2canvas + WYSIWYG Playwright screenshot), editable PPTX export (DOM → native PowerPoint objects), host-agnostic deck flattening + multi-host deploy (Vercel / GitHub Pages / Cloudflare Pages) + account-free Cloudflare quick-tunnel sharing.
